agent_message_parts_shape_check.name: agent_message_parts_shape_check
agent_message_parts_shape_check.value: ("agent_message_parts"."part_type" = 'text' and "agent_message_parts"."text_content" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_usage" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_kind" is null) or ("agent_message_parts"."part_type" = 'asset_ref' and "agent_message_parts"."text_content" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_version_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_usage" in ('attachment', 'context') and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_kind" is null) or ("agent_message_parts"."part_type" = 'artifact_ref' and "agent_message_parts"."text_content" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_usage" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_version_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_kind" in ('image', 'audio', 'video', 'slide', 'interactive', 'document'))

agent_operations_gateway_shape_check.name: agent_operations_gateway_shape_check
agent_operations_gateway_shape_check.value: ("agent_operations"."gateway_envelope_id" is null and "agent_operations"."request_fingerprint" is null and "agent_operations"."actor_user_id" is null and "agent_operations"."agent_id" is null and "agent_operations"."notebook_id" is null) or ("agent_operations"."gateway_envelope_id" is not null and char_length("agent_operations"."gateway_envelope_id") between 1 and 160 and "agent_operations"."request_fingerprint" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$' and "agent_operations"."actor_user_id" is not null and "agent_operations"."agent_id" is not null and "agent_operations"."notebook_id" is not null)

artifact_generation_jobs_failure_shape_c.name: artifact_generation_jobs_failure_shape_check
artifact_generation_jobs_failure_shape_c.value: ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" = 'failed' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."failure_code" is not null and char_length("artifact_generation_jobs"."failure_code") between 1 and 128) or ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" <> 'failed' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."failure_code" is null)

artifact_generation_jobs_lifecycle_shape.name: artifact_generation_jobs_lifecycle_shape_check
artifact_generation_jobs_lifecycle_shape.value: ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" = 'queued' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."started_at" is null and "artifact_generation_jobs"."completed_at" is null) or ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" = 'running' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."started_at" is not null and "artifact_generation_jobs"."completed_at" is null) or ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" in ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled') and "artifact_generation_jobs"."completed_at" is not null)

artifact_versions_content_shape_check.name: artifact_versions_content_shape_check
artifact_versions_content_shape_check.value: ("artifact_versions"."content" is not null and "artifact_versions"."object_key" is null and "artifact_versions"."checksum" is null) or ("artifact_versions"."content" is null and "artifact_versions"."object_key" is not null and "artifact_versions"."checksum" is not null)

artifact_versions_object_key_check.name: artifact_versions_object_key_check
artifact_versions_object_key_check.value: "artifact_versions"."object_key" is null or (char_length("artifact_versions"."object_key") between 1 and 1024 and "artifact_versions"."checksum" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$')

artifacts_text_check.name: artifacts_text_check
artifacts_text_check.value: char_length("artifacts"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and char_length("artifacts"."title") between 1 and 300

asset_versions_failure_shape_check.name: asset_versions_failure_shape_check
asset_versions_failure_shape_check.value: ("asset_versions"."status" = 'failed' and "asset_versions"."failure_code" is not null) or ("asset_versions"."status" <> 'failed' and "asset_versions"."failure_code" is null)

assets_status_shape_check.name: assets_status_shape_check
assets_status_shape_check.value: ("assets"."status" = 'ready' and "assets"."current_version_id" is not null and "assets"."tombstoned_at" is null) or ("assets"."status" in ('pending', 'processing', 'failed') and "assets"."current_version_id" is null and "assets"."tombstoned_at" is null) or ("assets"."status" = 'tombstoned' and "assets"."tombstoned_at" is not null)

assets_text_shape_check.name: assets_text_shape_check
assets_text_shape_check.value: char_length("assets"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and char_length("assets"."display_name") between 1 and 300 and ("assets"."mime_type" is null or char_length("assets"."mime_type") between 1 and 255)

chat_messages_idempotency_fields_check.name: chat_messages_idempotency_fields_check
chat_messages_idempotency_fields_check.value: ("chat_messages"."role" = 'student' and "chat_messages"."client_message_id" is not null and "chat_messages"."request_hash" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "chat_messages"."client_message_id" is null and "chat_messages"."request_hash" is null)

chat_messages_terminal_timestamps_check.name: chat_messages_terminal_timestamps_check
chat_messages_terminal_timestamps_check.value: ("chat_messages"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') and "chat_messages"."completed_at" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."status" in ('pending', 'streaming') and "chat_messages"."completed_at" is null)

chat_messages_cancelled_timestamp_check.name: chat_messages_cancelled_timestamp_check
chat_messages_cancelled_timestamp_check.value: ("chat_messages"."status" = 'cancelled' and "chat_messages"."cancelled_at" is not null and "chat_messages"."cancel_requested_at" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."status" <> 'cancelled' and "chat_messages"."cancelled_at" is null)

chat_messages_lease_shape_check.name: chat_messages_lease_shape_check
chat_messages_lease_shape_check.value: ("chat_messages"."role" = 'student' and "chat_messages"."lease_id" is null and "chat_messages"."lease_expires_at" is null and "chat_messages"."heartbeat_at" is null) or ("chat_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "chat_messages"."status" in ('pending', 'streaming') and "chat_messages"."lease_id" is not null and "chat_messages"."lease_expires_at" is not null and "chat_messages"."heartbeat_at" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "chat_messages"."status" in ('completed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted', 'failed') and "chat_messages"."lease_id" is null and "chat_messages"."lease_expires_at" is null)

conversation_messages_terminal_check.name: conversation_messages_terminal_check
conversation_messages_terminal_check.value: ("conversation_messages"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') and "conversation_messages"."completed_at" is not null) or ("conversation_messages"."status" in ('pending', 'streaming') and "conversation_messages"."completed_at" is null)

conversations_archive_shape_check.name: conversations_archive_shape_check
conversations_archive_shape_check.value: ("conversations"."status" = 'active' and "conversations"."archived_at" is null) or ("conversations"."status" = 'archived' and "conversations"."archived_at" is not null)

conversations_text_check.name: conversations_text_check
conversations_text_check.value: char_length("conversations"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and "conversations"."agent_profile_id" ~ '^[a-z][a-z0-9._-]{0,127}$' and ("conversations"."title" is null or char_length("conversations"."title") between 1 and 300)

gateway_approvals_decision_check.name: gateway_approvals_decision_check
gateway_approvals_decision_check.value: ("gateway_approvals"."status" = 'pending' and "gateway_approvals"."decided_by_user_id" is null and "gateway_approvals"."decided_at" is null) or ("gateway_approvals"."status" <> 'pending' and "gateway_approvals"."decided_by_user_id" is not null and "gateway_approvals"."decided_at" is not null)

gateway_deliveries_shape_check.name: gateway_deliveries_shape_check
gateway_deliveries_shape_check.value: "gateway_deliveries"."attempt" between 1 and 100 and jsonb_typeof("gateway_deliveries"."target") = 'object' and (("gateway_deliveries"."status" = 'failed' and "gateway_deliveries"."failure_code" is not null) or ("gateway_deliveries"."status" <> 'failed' and "gateway_deliveries"."failure_code" is null))

knowledge_chunks_content_check.name: knowledge_chunks_content_check
knowledge_chunks_content_check.value: char_length("knowledge_chunks"."content") between 1 and 20000 and ("knowledge_chunks"."heading" is null or char_length("knowledge_chunks"."heading") between 1 and 500)

knowledge_chunks_page_check.name: knowledge_chunks_page_check
knowledge_chunks_page_check.value: ("knowledge_chunks"."page_start" is null and "knowledge_chunks"."page_end" is null) or ("knowledge_chunks"."page_start" is not null and "knowledge_chunks"."page_end" is not null and "knowledge_chunks"."page_start" >= 1 and "knowledge_chunks"."page_end" >= "knowledge_chunks"."page_start")

knowledge_documents_failure_shape_check.name: knowledge_documents_failure_shape_check
knowledge_documents_failure_shape_check.value: ("knowledge_documents"."parse_status" = 'parse_failed' and "knowledge_documents"."failure_code" is not null and char_length("knowledge_documents"."failure_code") between 1 and 128) or ("knowledge_documents"."parse_status" <> 'parse_failed' and "knowledge_documents"."failure_code" is null)

knowledge_sources_tombstone_check.name: knowledge_sources_tombstone_check
knowledge_sources_tombstone_check.value: ("knowledge_sources"."status" = 'active' and "knowledge_sources"."tombstoned_at" is null) or ("knowledge_sources"."status" = 'tombstoned' and "knowledge_sources"."tombstoned_at" is not null)

knowledge_sources_text_shape_check.name: knowledge_sources_text_shape_check
knowledge_sources_text_shape_check.value: char_length("knowledge_sources"."grade_band") between 1 and 64 and char_length("knowledge_sources"."course_slug") between 1 and 128 and char_length("knowledge_sources"."source_key") between 1 and 128 and char_length("knowledge_sources"."title") between 1 and 300

lesson_sessions_archive_timestamp_check.name: lesson_sessions_archive_timestamp_check
lesson_sessions_archive_timestamp_check.value: ("lesson_sessions"."status" = 'active' and "lesson_sessions"."archived_at" is null) or ("lesson_sessions"."status" = 'archived' and "lesson_sessions"."archived_at" is not null)

model_runs_operation_shape_check.name: model_runs_operation_shape_check
model_runs_operation_shape_check.value: ("model_runs"."operation_kind" = 'teaching_turn' and "model_runs"."session_id" is not null and "model_runs"."agent_operation_id" is null and "model_runs"."assistant_message_id" is not null and "model_runs"."conversation_message_id" is null and "model_runs"."turn_id" is not null and "model_runs"."operation_id" = "model_runs"."turn_id" and "model_runs"."task_alias" = 'teaching.turn') or ("model_runs"."operation_kind" = 'agent_turn' and "model_runs"."agent_operation_id" is not null and "model_runs"."operation_id" = "model_runs"."agent_operation_id" and (("model_runs"."task_alias" = 'agent.turn' and "model_runs"."session_id" is null and "model_runs"."assistant_message_id" is null and "model_runs"."conversation_message_id" is not null and "model_runs"."turn_id" is null) or ("model_runs"."task_alias" = 'teaching.turn' and "model_runs"."session_id" is not null and "model_runs"."assistant_message_id" is not null and "model_runs"."conversation_message_id" is null and "model_runs"."turn_id" = "model_runs"."agent_operation_id")))

model_runs_text_check.name: model_runs_text_check
model_runs_text_check.value: char_length("model_runs"."trace_id") between 1 and 128 and "model_runs"."task_alias" in ('agent.turn', 'teaching.turn') and "model_runs"."model_alias" in ('primary', 'fast', 'structured', 'speech') and char_length("model_runs"."prompt_version") between 1 and 128 and "model_runs"."prompt_hash" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$' and ("model_runs"."provider" is null or char_length("model_runs"."provider") between 1 and 128) and ("model_runs"."provider_model_id" is null or char_length("model_runs"."provider_model_id") between 1 and 256) and ("model_runs"."model_revision" is null or char_length("model_runs"."model_revision") between 1 and 256) and ("model_runs"."provider_response_id" is null or char_length("model_runs"."provider_response_id") between 1 and 512) and ("model_runs"."system_fingerprint" is null or char_length("model_runs"."system_fingerprint") between 1 and 512) and ("model_runs"."finish_reason" is null or "model_runs"."finish_reason" in ('stop', 'tool_calls', 'length', 'content_filter', 'cancelled', 'error', 'other')) and ("model_runs"."error_code" is null or "model_runs"."error_code" ~ '^[a-z][a-z0-9._:-]{0,127}$')

model_runs_usage_check.name: model_runs_usage_check
model_runs_usage_check.value: coalesce("model_runs"."input_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."output_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."cache_hit_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."reasoning_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."latency_ms", 0) >= 0

model_runs_lifecycle_timestamps_check.name: model_runs_lifecycle_timestamps_check
model_runs_lifecycle_timestamps_check.value: ("model_runs"."status" = 'pending' and "model_runs"."started_at" is null and "model_runs"."completed_at" is null) or ("model_runs"."status" = 'running' and "model_runs"."started_at" is not null and "model_runs"."completed_at" is null) or ("model_runs"."status" in ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') and "model_runs"."completed_at" is not null)

notebook_memberships_time_check.name: notebook_memberships_time_check
notebook_memberships_time_check.value: ("notebook_memberships"."expires_at" is null or "notebook_memberships"."expires_at" > "notebook_memberships"."granted_at") and ("notebook_memberships"."revoked_at" is null or "notebook_memberships"."revoked_at" >= "notebook_memberships"."granted_at")

operation_continuations_text_check.name: operation_continuations_text_check
operation_continuations_text_check.value: "operation_continuations"."protocol_version" = 'educanvas.operation-continuation.v1' and char_length("operation_continuations"."approval_id") between 1 and 256 and "operation_continuations"."approval_id" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]*$' and "operation_continuations"."adapter_source" in ('local', 'teaching', 'mcp', 'node') and char_length("operation_continuations"."resume_ref") between 1 and 256 and "operation_continuations"."resume_ref" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]*$' and ("operation_continuations"."lease_owner_id" is null or (char_length("operation_continuations"."lease_owner_id") between 1 and 256 and "operation_continuations"."lease_owner_id" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]*$')) and ("operation_continuations"."failure_code" is null or "operation_continuations"."failure_code" ~ '^[a-z][a-z0-9._:-]{0,127}$')

operation_continuations_trace_parent_che.name: operation_continuations_trace_parent_check
operation_continuations_trace_parent_che.value: "operation_continuations"."trace_parent" is null or (char_length("operation_continuations"."trace_parent") = 55 and "operation_continuations"."trace_parent" ~ '^00-[0-9a-f]{32}-[0-9a-f]{16}-0[01]$' and substring("operation_continuations"."trace_parent" from 4 for 32) <> repeat('0', 32) and substring("operation_continuations"."trace_parent" from 37 for 16) <> repeat('0', 16))

operation_continuations_lease_check.name: operation_continuations_lease_check
operation_continuations_lease_check.value: "operation_continuations"."lease_generation" between 0 and 1000000 and (("operation_continuations"."status" = 'running' and "operation_continuations"."lease_generation" >= 1 and "operation_continuations"."lease_owner_id" is not null and "operation_continuations"."lease_expires_at" is not null and "operation_continuations"."heartbeat_at" is not null) or ("operation_continuations"."status" <> 'running' and "operation_continuations"."lease_owner_id" is null and "operation_continuations"."lease_expires_at" is null and "operation_continuations"."heartbeat_at" is null))

operation_continuations_terminal_check.name: operation_continuations_terminal_check
operation_continuations_terminal_check.value: (("operation_continuations"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled')) = ("operation_continuations"."completed_at" is not null)) and (("operation_continuations"."status" = 'failed') = ("operation_continuations"."failure_code" is not null))

operation_sources_public_shape_check.name: operation_sources_public_shape_check
operation_sources_public_shape_check.value: char_length("operation_sources"."label") between 1 and 400 and char_length("operation_sources"."locator_url") between 8 and 2048 and "operation_sources"."locator_url" ~* '^https?://'

spaces_text_check.name: spaces_text_check
spaces_text_check.value: char_length("spaces"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and char_length("spaces"."title") between 1 and 300

spaces_archive_shape_check.name: spaces_archive_shape_check
spaces_archive_shape_check.value: ("spaces"."status" = 'active' and "spaces"."archived_at" is null) or ("spaces"."status" = 'archived' and "spaces"."archived_at" is not null)

tool_approval_intents_text_check.name: tool_approval_intents_text_check
tool_approval_intents_text_check.value: "tool_approval_intents"."protocol_version" = 'educanvas.tool-approval-intent.v1' and char_length("tool_approval_intents"."approval_id") between 1 and 256 and "tool_approval_intents"."approval_id" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]*$' and "tool_approval_intents"."adapter_source" in ('local', 'teaching', 'mcp', 'node') and char_length("tool_approval_intents"."resume_ref") between 1 and 256 and "tool_approval_intents"."resume_ref" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]*$'

tool_approval_intents_trace_parent_check.name: tool_approval_intents_trace_parent_check
tool_approval_intents_trace_parent_check.value: "tool_approval_intents"."trace_parent" is null or (char_length("tool_approval_intents"."trace_parent") = 55 and "tool_approval_intents"."trace_parent" ~ '^00-[0-9a-f]{32}-[0-9a-f]{16}-0[01]$' and substring("tool_approval_intents"."trace_parent" from 4 for 32) <> repeat('0', 32) and substring("tool_approval_intents"."trace_parent" from 37 for 16) <> repeat('0', 16))

tool_approval_intents_lifecycle_check.name: tool_approval_intents_lifecycle_check
tool_approval_intents_lifecycle_check.value: ("tool_approval_intents"."status" = 'prepared' and "tool_approval_intents"."bound_at" is null and "tool_approval_intents"."abandoned_at" is null) or ("tool_approval_intents"."status" = 'bound' and "tool_approval_intents"."bound_at" is not null and "tool_approval_intents"."abandoned_at" is null) or ("tool_approval_intents"."status" = 'abandoned' and "tool_approval_intents"."bound_at" is null and "tool_approval_intents"."abandoned_at" is not null)

tool_approval_intents_time_check.name: tool_approval_intents_time_check
tool_approval_intents_time_check.value: "tool_approval_intents"."expires_at" > "tool_approval_intents"."prepared_at" and ("tool_approval_intents"."bound_at" is null or "tool_approval_intents"."bound_at" >= "tool_approval_intents"."prepared_at") and ("tool_approval_intents"."abandoned_at" is null or "tool_approval_intents"."abandoned_at" >= "tool_approval_intents"."prepared_at")

tool_calls_scope_check.name: tool_calls_scope_check
tool_calls_scope_check.value: ("tool_calls"."session_id" is not null and "tool_calls"."turn_id" is not null and "tool_calls"."teaching_state" is not null and "tool_calls"."agent_operation_id" is null) or ("tool_calls"."session_id" is null and "tool_calls"."turn_id" is null and "tool_calls"."teaching_state" is null and "tool_calls"."agent_operation_id" is not null)

tool_calls_lifecycle_check.name: tool_calls_lifecycle_check
tool_calls_lifecycle_check.value: ("tool_calls"."status" = 'pending' and "tool_calls"."started_at" is null and "tool_calls"."completed_at" is null) or ("tool_calls"."status" = 'running' and "tool_calls"."started_at" is not null and "tool_calls"."completed_at" is null) or ("tool_calls"."status" in ('succeeded', 'rejected', 'failed', 'outcome_unknown') and "tool_calls"."completed_at" is not null)

tool_calls_result_shape_check.name: tool_calls_result_shape_check
tool_calls_result_shape_check.value: ("tool_calls"."status" = 'succeeded' and "tool_calls"."result_summary" is not null and "tool_calls"."code" is null) or ("tool_calls"."status" in ('rejected', 'failed', 'outcome_unknown') and "tool_calls"."result_summary" is null and "tool_calls"."code" is not null) or ("tool_calls"."status" in ('pending', 'running') and "tool_calls"."result_summary" is null and "tool_calls"."code" is null)

tool_effects_text_check.name: tool_effects_text_check
tool_effects_text_check.value: "tool_effects"."effect_key" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{0,159}$' and "tool_effects"."semantics_hash" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$' and ("tool_effects"."reconciliation_verifier_id" is null or "tool_effects"."reconciliation_verifier_id" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{0,159}$') and ("tool_effects"."code" is null or "tool_effects"."code" ~ '^[a-z][a-z0-9._:-]{0,127}$') and ("tool_effects"."receipt_hash" is null or "tool_effects"."receipt_hash" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$')

tool_effects_lifecycle_check.name: tool_effects_lifecycle_check
tool_effects_lifecycle_check.value: ("tool_effects"."status" = 'intended' and "tool_effects"."code" is null and "tool_effects"."receipt_hash" is null and "tool_effects"."settled_at" is null) or ("tool_effects"."status" = 'committed' and "tool_effects"."code" is null and "tool_effects"."settled_at" is not null) or ("tool_effects"."status" in ('failed', 'outcome_unknown') and "tool_effects"."code" is not null and "tool_effects"."receipt_hash" is null and "tool_effects"."settled_at" is not null)

turn_context_snapshots_scope_check.name: turn_context_snapshots_scope_check
turn_context_snapshots_scope_check.value: ("turn_context_snapshots"."session_id" is not null and "turn_context_snapshots"."turn_id" is not null and "turn_context_snapshots"."agent_operation_id" is null) or ("turn_context_snapshots"."session_id" is null and "turn_context_snapshots"."turn_id" is null and "turn_context_snapshots"."agent_operation_id" is not null)

diagnostic_attempts_shape_check.name: diagnostic_attempts_shape_check
diagnostic_attempts_shape_check.value: "diagnostic_attempts"."attempted_items" between 3 and 10 and "diagnostic_attempts"."correct_items" between 0 and "diagnostic_attempts"."attempted_items" and char_length("diagnostic_attempts"."definition_version") between 1 and 128 and "diagnostic_attempts"."answer_fingerprint" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$'

diagnostic_responses_text_check.name: diagnostic_responses_text_check
diagnostic_responses_text_check.value: char_length("diagnostic_responses"."question_id") between 1 and 128 and char_length("diagnostic_responses"."selected_option_id") between 1 and 128 and char_length("diagnostic_responses"."grading_version") between 1 and 128

learner_profiles_shape_check.name: learner_profiles_shape_check
learner_profiles_shape_check.value:
jsonb_typeof("learner_profiles"."preferences") = 'object'
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences" ?& array['explanationOrder', 'responseDepth', 'guidance', 'modality', 'feedbackStyle']::text[]
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences" - array['explanationOrder', 'responseDepth', 'guidance', 'modality', 'feedbackStyle']::text[] = '{}'::jsonb
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences"->>'explanationOrder' in ('example_first', 'concept_first')
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences"->>'responseDepth' in ('concise', 'balanced', 'detailed')
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences"->>'guidance' in ('step_by_step', 'independent_first')
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences"->>'modality' in ('visual', 'text', 'practice', 'mixed')
        and "learner_profiles"."preferences"->>'feedbackStyle' in ('gentle', 'direct', 'balanced')
        and "learner_profiles"."version" >= 1

learning_goals_text_check.name: learning_goals_text_check
learning_goals_text_check.value: char_length("learning_goals"."course_slug") between 1 and 128 and char_length("learning_goals"."course_version") between 1 and 64 and char_length("learning_goals"."topic") between 1 and 120 and char_length("learning_goals"."desired_outcome") between 1 and 500

learning_goals_lifecycle_check.name: learning_goals_lifecycle_check
learning_goals_lifecycle_check.value: ("learning_goals"."status" = 'active' and "learning_goals"."completed_at" is null and "learning_goals"."archived_at" is null) or ("learning_goals"."status" = 'completed' and "learning_goals"."completed_at" is not null and "learning_goals"."archived_at" is null) or ("learning_goals"."status" = 'archived' and "learning_goals"."archived_at" is not null)

learning_objectives_text_check.name: learning_objectives_text_check
learning_objectives_text_check.value: char_length("learning_objectives"."objective_key") between 1 and 128 and char_length("learning_objectives"."knowledge_node_id") between 1 and 128 and char_length("learning_objectives"."title") between 1 and 80 and char_length("learning_objectives"."description") between 1 and 300

web_user_profiles_avatar_check.name: web_user_profiles_avatar_check
web_user_profiles_avatar_check.value: ("web_user_profiles"."avatar_object_key" is null and "web_user_profiles"."avatar_mime_type" is null) or ("web_user_profiles"."avatar_object_key" ~ '^assets/[a-f0-9]{16}/[0-9a-f-]+\.[a-z0-9]+$' and "web_user_profiles"."avatar_mime_type" in ('image/png', 'image/jpeg', 'image/webp'))

mcp_tool_intents_identity_check.name: mcp_tool_intents_identity_check
mcp_tool_intents_identity_check.value: "mcp_tool_intents"."resume_ref" ~ '^mcp\.intent:[a-f0-9]{64}$' and char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."server_id") between 1 and 64 and char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."remote_tool_name") between 1 and 128 and char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."model_tool_name") between 1 and 64 and char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."capability") between 1 and 64

mcp_tool_intents_cipher_check.name: mcp_tool_intents_cipher_check
mcp_tool_intents_cipher_check.value: (("mcp_tool_intents"."status" = 'prepared' and "mcp_tool_intents"."key_version" = 'v1' and "mcp_tool_intents"."nonce" is not null and "mcp_tool_intents"."ciphertext" is not null and "mcp_tool_intents"."auth_tag" is not null) or ("mcp_tool_intents"."status" <> 'prepared' and "mcp_tool_intents"."key_version" is null and "mcp_tool_intents"."nonce" is null and "mcp_tool_intents"."ciphertext" is null and "mcp_tool_intents"."auth_tag" is null)) and ("mcp_tool_intents"."nonce" is null or char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."nonce") between 16 and 24) and ("mcp_tool_intents"."auth_tag" is null or char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."auth_tag") between 20 and 32) and ("mcp_tool_intents"."ciphertext" is null or char_length("mcp_tool_intents"."ciphertext") between 1 and 350000)

mcp_tool_intents_lifecycle_check.name: mcp_tool_intents_lifecycle_check
mcp_tool_intents_lifecycle_check.value: ("mcp_tool_intents"."status" = 'prepared' and "mcp_tool_intents"."dispatch_started_at" is null and "mcp_tool_intents"."settled_at" is null) or ("mcp_tool_intents"."status" = 'dispatching' and "mcp_tool_intents"."dispatch_started_at" is not null and "mcp_tool_intents"."settled_at" is null) or ("mcp_tool_intents"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'outcome_unknown') and "mcp_tool_intents"."settled_at" is not null)

mcp_tool_intents_time_check.name: mcp_tool_intents_time_check
mcp_tool_intents_time_check.value: "mcp_tool_intents"."expires_at" > "mcp_tool_intents"."prepared_at" and ("mcp_tool_intents"."dispatch_started_at" is null or "mcp_tool_intents"."dispatch_started_at" >= "mcp_tool_intents"."prepared_at") and ("mcp_tool_intents"."settled_at" is null or "mcp_tool_intents"."settled_at" >= "mcp_tool_intents"."prepared_at")

tool_effect_reconciliations_text_check.name: tool_effect_reconciliations_text_check
tool_effect_reconciliations_text_check.value: "tool_effect_reconciliations"."resolver_id" ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{0,159}$' and "tool_effect_reconciliations"."evidence_hash" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$' and ("tool_effect_reconciliations"."receipt_hash" is null or "tool_effect_reconciliations"."receipt_hash" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$') and ("tool_effect_reconciliations"."code" is null or "tool_effect_reconciliations"."code" ~ '^[a-z][a-z0-9._:-]{0,127}$')

tool_effect_reconciliations_shape_check.name: tool_effect_reconciliations_shape_check
tool_effect_reconciliations_shape_check.value: ("tool_effect_reconciliations"."resolution" = 'confirmed_committed' and "tool_effect_reconciliations"."code" is null) or ("tool_effect_reconciliations"."resolution" = 'confirmed_not_committed' and "tool_effect_reconciliations"."receipt_hash" is null and "tool_effect_reconciliations"."code" is not null)
